sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109541" key="u(pofwleu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποφωλεύω</orth>, <sense id="n109541.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lie hidden in the shelter of,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τοίχοις</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.375</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antiphil.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
